docs.title: #product thread
docs.content:
Thread in #product:
penny: Is the gradual rollout infrastructure ready? We want to turn on the new dashboard for 5% of users next week.
robin: It's live. PR #55 shipped the token-bucket gates. You can flip the flag in the admin panel.

docs.title: PR #55: Gradual rollout token-bucket gates
docs.content:
PR #55 in prbe-backend: Gradual rollout token-bucket gates
Author: nora
Description: Adds Redis-backed token-bucket gates per feature flag. Supports canary (5%), staged (20%), and GA (100%) tiers. Admin API at /api/flags/{flag_id}/rollout.

expected_edges.note: Slack thread tangentially references PR #55 as the delivery vehicle for gradual rollout, without deeply analyzing its contents
